overview.name: File Payload
overview.description:
This scenario verifies API support for file-based request payload.
Test flow includes: 1. Send POST request with request body loaded from external file and verify response status = 201. 2. Extract created entity ID from response. 3. Send GET request by ID and verify response status = 200. 4. Validate response body matches created entity.
This scenario validates: - Request body loading from external file - JSON payload processing from file - Entity creation from file-based payload - Entity retrieval by ID - Response body consistency

http.comment: Step 1. Send POST request with payload from file and verify response = 201
Step 3-4. Send GET request and validate created entity from file payload
